short_description: Download & Save Justporn Videos Easily for Offline Viewing (Browser Extension)
long_description: Justporn Downloader is built around the straightforward JustPorn video page structure, targeting the clean /video/{slug}/ URL pattern found on the platform. The extension watches for media references inside embedded players and presents available download options when stream data is detected. This keeps the download process simple and directly tied to the actual JustPorn video experience.

faqs.question: What URL pattern does this extension work with?
faqs.answer: The extension is built for Justporn video pages that follow the /video/{slug}/ structure, such as www.justporn.com/video/15743/busty-maiden-sophia-locke-is-ready-for-battle/.

faqs.question: Does this work with all Justporn video pages?
faqs.answer: The extension targets pages matching the standard video route pattern. Other page types may not be supported.

faqs.question: What video formats can I download?
faqs.answer: The extension detects m3u8 playlists and mp4 files when they are surfaced through the page's embedded player.

faqs.question: Is this extension free to use?
faqs.answer: You get 3 free downloads to test the workflow. Unlimited downloads require a paid license.

faqs.question: Do I need to create an account?
faqs.answer: Email sign-in is required for license verification, using secure one-time password authentication.

faqs.question: Is my data safe with this extension?
faqs.answer: The extension processes downloads locally and does not collect unnecessary data. Standard privacy practices are followed.

why: Downloading videos from Justporn can be frustrating when you rely on generic tools that don't understand the site's specific page structure. Many downloaders fail to detect media because they don't account for the embedded player flow that Justporn uses on its video pages. This leaves you with broken downloads, missing files, or no options at all.

Justporn Downloader solves this by targeting the actual Justporn video page pattern directly. The extension is built around the /video/{slug}/ route structure and understands how media is surfaced through the page's embedded player. Instead of guessing or using broad detection methods, it focuses on what Justporn actually presents — making the download process more reliable and straightforward.
how_it_works: Install the extension from the latest release.
Open Justporn and go to a supported video page.
Start playback so the extension can detect the media.
Open the popup or use the on-page controls.
Choose the quality option you want.
Start the download and wait for the MP4 export to finish.
tutorial: Open your browser and navigate to a Justporn video page that follows the /video/{slug}/ pattern.
Wait for the page to fully load, including the embedded player area.
Click the extension icon in your browser toolbar to open the popup.
The extension will scan the page for available media streams.
Review the detected formats and quality options displayed in the popup.
Select your preferred quality option from the available choices.
Click the download button to start the process.
Wait for the conversion to complete and save the MP4 file to your device.

troubleshooting: The extension doesn't detect any media on the video page Make sure the video player has fully loaded and playback has started. Some players require initial interaction before exposing stream data.
Download fails or produces a broken file Try refreshing the page and waiting for the player to fully initialize before starting the download process again.
The popup shows no options available Verify you are on a supported Justporn video page with the /video/{slug}/ URL pattern. Some pages may use different structures that aren't currently supported.
Download speed is very slow Your connection speed and the source server's bandwidth both affect download rates. Try again during off-peak hours for potentially better performance.
The extension icon is grayed out on a video page The extension may not recognize the current page as a supported Justporn video page. Check the URL format and try navigating to a standard video page.
